content: 00:00 Tune-in 00:00 Show Start 00:51 Rhythm Paradise Groove 04:34 Onimusha: Way of the Sword 05:48 Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen 07:12 Stellar Blade 07:52 Orbitals 08:40 Rayman Legends Retold 09:24 Big Walk 10:51 ONE PIECE: Grand Gourmet 12:14 Pokémon Pokopia – Free update and Expansion Pass 14:20 Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave 17:30 Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet 18:47 The DK Challenge barrels in! 19:50 Donkey Kong Bananza: DK Island & Emerald Rush 20:37 JUJUTSU KAISEN RUMBLE: SURVIVATON 21:55 Lords of the Fallen II 22:40 Lies of P: Complete Edition 23:31 Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition 24:24 Muramasa: Revenant Blades 25:07 Three Xenoblade Chronicles games, coming to Nintendo Switch 2! 26:47 Xenoblade Genesis 29:42 Nintendo Switch Sports Resort 34:28 RuneScape: Dragonwilds 35:45 Hello Kitty Party Land 36:22 Star Fox 37:03 FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE 38:28 Pikuniku 2 39:40 DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Withered World 41:13 The Duskbloods 42:17 Splatoon Raiders 45:25 DELTARUNE Chapter 5 46:10 Metaphor: ReFantazio 47:25 Minecraft on Nintendo Switch 2 48:07 Even more games coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch 50:14 Three collections of KINGDOM HEARTS games are on the way! 51:23 KINGDOM HEARTS IV 53:03 The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Watch this Nintendo Direct presentation for around 50 minutes focused on games coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch this year. Please note: the release date for Lies of P: Complete Edition (digital version) shown in this presentation is the Japanese release date. Lies of P: Complete Edition (digital version) will launch in Europe on August 5th, 2026. chineseContent: 00:00 收视 00:00 演出开始 00:51 节奏天堂节奏 04:34 鬼武者：剑道 05:48 龙之信条 2：黑暗崛起 07:12 恒星之刃 07:52 轨道 08:40 雷曼传奇重述 09:24 Big Walk 10:51 海贼王：盛大美食 12:14 神奇宝贝 Pokopia – 免费更新和扩展通行证 14:20 火焰之纹章：财富之网 17:30 忍者拉 2：神秘星球 18:47 DK 挑战即将开始！ 19:50 大金刚巴南扎：DK 岛与翡翠狂奔 20:37 柔术快战：生存 21:55 堕落之王 II 22:40 P 的谎言：完全版 23:31 鬼泣 5 恶魔猎人版 24:24 村正：亡魂之刃 25:07 三部异度之刃编年史游戏即将登陆 Nintendo Switch 2！ 26:47 异度之刃创世纪 29:42 Nintendo Switch 运动度假村 34:28 RuneScape: Dragonwilds 35:45 Hello Kitty Party Land 36:22 Star Fox 37:03 最终幻想共鸣 38:28 Pikuniku 2 39:40 DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Withered World 41:13 Duskbloods 42:17 Splatoon Raiders 45:25 DELTARUNE 第 5 章 46:10 隐喻：ReFantazio 47:25 Nintendo Switch 2 上的 Minecraft 48:07 更多游戏即将登陆 Nintendo Switch 2 和 Nintendo Switch 50:14 三款《王国之心》游戏合集即将推出！ 51:23 王国之心 IV 53:03 塞尔达传说：时之笛 观看约 50 分钟的 Nintendo Direct 演示，重点介绍今年即将登陆 Nintendo Switch 2 和 Nintendo Switch 的游戏。请注意：本演示中显示的《Lies of P: Complete Edition》（数字版）的发行日期为日本发行日期。 《P 的谎言：完整版》（数字版）将于 2026 年 8 月 5 日在欧洲推出。 Facebook Nintendo Switch：https://facebook.com/NintendoSwitchUK Facebook Nintendo：https://facebook.com/NintendoUK X Nintendo UK：https://x.com/NintendoUK Instagram Nintendo
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
